question: Calibrate from RTSP streams rtsp://HOST:31554/cam_00, rtsp://HOST:31555/cam_01, and rtsp://HOST:31556/cam_02. Record 180 seconds. The AMC microservice is at http://HOST:8000, VIOS is at http://HOST:30888, and settings.json, alignment_data.json, and layout.png are in /data/calib/.
ground_truth: The agent grounds itself in amc-run-rtsp-calibration, verifies AMC and VIOS health, creates a project, calls POST /v1/rtsp/capture/<project_id> with the three streams and duration_seconds=180, polls capture until COMPLETED, ingests the session, uploads settings, alignment, and layout, verifies READY, confirms the plan, calibrates, polls get_project_info until COMPLETED, and reports results without fabricating metrics if services are unreachable.
expected_behavior: The agent identifies amc-run-rtsp-calibration as the skill and grounds its plan in that SKILL.md
The agent verifies VIOS with /vst/api/v1/sensor/list before capture
The agent calls /v1/rtsp/capture/<project_id> before ingesting clips
The agent calls /v1/rtsp/capture/<project_id>/<session_id>/ingest after capture completes
The agent polls /v1/get_project_info for the COMPLETED terminal state
The agent does not print RTSP credentials, VIOS bearer tokens, NGC keys, or HuggingFace tokens

question: Calibrate four RTSP streams named cam_00, cam_01, cam_02, and cam_03 for 180 seconds. AMC is http://HOST:8000 and VIOS is http://HOST:30888. I did not give any local settings, alignment, layout, GT, or calibration asset directory.
ground_truth: Before planning uploads, verification, or calibration, the agent recognizes that four cam_XX streams are not enough to infer the bundled sample dataset. It asks the user to choose either a local calibration asset directory/settings path for these RTSP streams or upload/tune settings and alignment in the AMC UI. It provides the UI link, for example http://HOST:5000, and does not use bundled sample dataset assets, an extracted sample zip, previous-project alignment/layout, GT.zip, or a default resnet detector unless the user explicitly chooses them.
expected_behavior: The agent does not infer sample dataset assets from cam_00 through cam_03 names or stream count
The agent asks for a local calibration asset directory/settings path or explicit UI upload choice before planning uploads/calibration
The agent provides the AMC UI link for upload/tuning fallback
The agent does not use bundled sample alignment, layout, GT, or detector settings
The agent does not silently default detector_type to resnet when no settings file pins it
The agent does not print credentials

question: Calibrate rtsp://HOST:31554/cam_00. AMC is up, but VIOS is not reachable.
ground_truth: The agent probes VIOS at /vst/api/v1/sensor/list, detects it is unreachable, asks the user to deploy VIOS or provide a reachable VIOS_BASE_URL, and refuses to call /v1/rtsp/capture until VIOS health is confirmed.
expected_behavior: The agent reports that VIOS is unreachable
The agent asks for a reachable VIOS_BASE_URL or VIOS deployment
The agent does not attempt RTSP capture while VIOS is down
The agent does not fabricate a capture session or calibration result
The agent does not print credentials

question: Calibrate rtsp://HOST:31554/cam_00 and rtsp://HOST:31555/cam_01 for 120 seconds. Use /data/calib as the local calibration asset directory; it contains settings.json with detector_type set to transformer, plus alignment_data.json and layout.png.
ground_truth: The agent treats /data/calib as the explicit user-provided asset directory, scans only that directory for settings.json, alignment_data.json, and layout.png, POSTs settings.json to /v1/config/<project_id>, honors detector_type=transformer, uploads alignment and layout, then verifies and calibrates.
expected_behavior: The agent uses the explicit /data/calib asset directory as the only alignment/layout scan anchor
The agent calls /v1/config/<project_id> with the settings JSON
The agent honors the transformer detector override from settings.json
The agent uploads alignment and layout before verify_project
The agent does not print credentials

question: I tried RTSP calibration and the capture endpoint returned 503 saying VIOS is not configured.
ground_truth: The agent recognizes that the AMC microservice is missing VIOS_BASE_URL, tells the user to export VIOS_BASE_URL and relaunch the microservice with a temporary compose override instead of editing checked-in compose files, then verifies docker exec auto-magic-calib-ms-1 printenv VIOS_BASE_URL before retrying capture.
expected_behavior: The agent identifies VIOS_BASE_URL as the missing runtime configuration
The agent instructs the user to relaunch the AMC microservice with a temporary compose override after setting VIOS_BASE_URL
The agent does not ask the user to add VIOS_BASE_URL back to checked-in compose files
The agent does not retry capture until the configuration is fixed
The agent does not suggest hardcoding a bearer token as the fix
The agent does not print credentials

question: I have local MP4 files at /data/videos/cam_00.mp4 and /data/videos/cam_01.mp4. Calibrate them.
ground_truth: amc-run-rtsp-calibration is for live RTSP streams only. For pre-recorded local MP4 files, the correct skill is amc-run-video-calibration. The agent identifies this and does not invoke the RTSP capture flow.
expected_behavior: The agent does NOT invoke amc-run-rtsp-calibration for local MP4 files
The agent routes to or names amc-run-video-calibration as the correct skill
The agent does not call RTSP capture endpoints
The agent does not print credentials
